title: PEDAL COMMANDER for Ford F-150 Raptor F150 2011+ Throttle Response Controller Fits: SVT, 3.5L Ecoboost, 5.4L V8, 6.2L V8, Raptor Performance Parts & Accessories - PC18
features: Customizable Driving Modes & Anti-Theft Protection – Choose from Eco, City, Sport, and Sport+ for precise throttle control. The anti-theft mode locks the gas pedal via the app for enhanced security.
Improved Efficiency & Control – Eco Mode optimizes F150 Raptor`s fuel efficiency without compromising smooth performance.
Quick & Easy Installation: The plug-and-play design installs in 10 minutes, and the free Pedal Commander app allows seamless control.

Warranty-Safe & Compatible: The Pedal Commander throttle response controller leaves no trace on the ECU, ensuring your vehicle’s warranty remains intact. It works with tuners, programmers, chips, and cold air intakes.
Fits 2011-2024 Ford F-150 Raptor Models – Designed for SVT, 3.5L EcoBoost, 5.4L V8, and 6.2L V8 engines, ensuring a perfect fit.
description: Product Description Pedal Commander Throttle Response Controller For Ford F-150 Raptor Previous page Next page 1 Yes, Just in 10 Minutes! 2 What`s in the box? 3 Backed by the pros 4 Installation Pedal Commander enhances throttle response for your Ford F-150 Raptor, allowing quicker access to existing horsepower without adding power. It complements various vehicle mods like tuners, programmers, cold air intakes, and performance chips. Pedal Commander will not leave "flags" on the ECU.
